channel.title: Charly's Tread Program
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Movement Prep (Daily Mobility Focus)
item.description: Daily Mobility Go through the entire routine 2x Daily Can skip 'B' Exercise when time is short
item.guid: Charly Program Sample/Movement Prep (Daily Mobility Focus).md

item.title: Block 1 & 2 Lifts
item.description: Weeks 1-4 lifts are unchanged throughout reps will remain the same increase weight by 5lbs increments to maintain a similar RPE throughout the phase The goal is to accumulate a bunch of 'heavy medium' reps Weeks 5-8 lifts are unchanged throughout reps will remain the same increase weight by 5lbs increments to maintain a similar RPE throughout the phase The goal is to accumulate a bunch of 'heavy reps'

item.title: Trackman Data
item.description: Jumper's Knee Protocol - Pattelar Tendonitis Rehab Training -- Jake Tuura -- 2022 -- 55cdb56c525f464448e411b40e96322f -- Anna’s Archive.pdfNile river Hey if you are not seeing your data here please request it from your coach Click here to access the free mental health course Good v. Bad Remote Athlete Outline Nutrition Tracking Tutorial
